task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a list named 'SAR Grid - Fells' in Garmin BaseCamp.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Library pane (usually on the left) in Garmin BaseCamp shows a list named 'SAR Grid - Fells' selected or newly created.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the six specified waypoints inside the 'SAR Grid - Fells' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The data pane (bottom-left) or the main map area shows exactly six waypoints named GRID-A1, GRID-A2, GRID-A3, GRID-B1, GRID-B2, and GRID-B3.

task_completion.description: Verify the coordinates of the waypoints are set correctly according to the grid specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Waypoint properties dialogs are opened showing coordinates matching the N 42.44400° / N 42.44600° and W 71.09200° / W 71.09400° / W 71.09600° grid.

task_completion.description: Verify the symbol for the waypoints is set to 'Flag, Blue'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The icons next to the waypoint names in the list pane or on the map are blue flags, or the waypoint properties dialog shows 'Flag, Blue' selected in the symbol dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiates the export process for the 'SAR Grid - Fells' list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The File menu is opened with 'Export' -> 'Export 'SAR Grid - Fells'' selected, or the export dialog is open.

task_completion.description: Verify the exported file is saved to the correct path as a GPX file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the file name 'sar_grid.gpx', the 'Save as type' is set to GPX, and the directory path in the address bar is 'C:\workspace\output'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Garmin BaseCamp application to create the waypoints and export the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Garmin BaseCamp interface. The agent should not be using a text editor or terminal to manually write the GPX XML code.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually created or edited the waypoints using BaseCamp tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the use of the New Waypoint tool, coordinate entry in the properties window, or symbol selection dropdown, rather than just renaming existing unrelated waypoints.

integrity.description: Verify no other waypoints are included in the exported list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'SAR Grid - Fells' list in BaseCamp contains exactly six waypoints before export, with no additional items visible in the data pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a list named 'SAR Grid - Fells' and exporting it to 'C:\workspace\output\sar_grid.gpx'. The list must contain exactly six waypoints with the symbol 'Flag, Blue'. The required coordinates are: GRID-A1 (42.444, -71.096), GRID-A2 (42.444, -71.094), GRID-A3 (42.444, -71.092), GRID-B1 (42.446, -71.096), GRID-B2 (42.446, -71.094), and GRID-B3 (42.446, -71.092). A coordinate tolerance of 0.001 degrees is acceptable.
